response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payment Concern  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payments that I did not make. I believe the block was incorrectly applied, as I have not engaged in any transactions that would warrant such action. I am requesting that my account be unblocked immediately.  

Please review the following details:  
- My account was blocked on [date].  
- The block was triggered by payments associated with [payment method/amount], which I did not initiate.  
- I have not made any payments in the past [X] months.  

I am confident that my account is legitimate and that the block was a mistake. I would appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter promptly.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Email Address]  
[Your Account ID or Other Unique Identifier]
